title: Nezumi Steals Nami’s Hope
scene: On pages 17–18, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. The truth of Nami’s long sacrifice collides with Marine corruption and Arlong’s manipulation.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What's Wrong, My talented Little Cartographer?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The Marines you've got working for you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just came to steal my money!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's the meaning of this!? Didn't you say you'd rather die than break a promise involving money!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hm? But I did keep that promise, didn't I? When did I ever break it?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't play dumb with me! You ordered those marines to steal my m...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Did I ever break our promise? Please, tell me!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
